name: harness-starter-coding
author: octos
description: Starter for a harnessed coding-assistant custom app. Produces a diff artifact and a file-list preview under patches/.

tools.name: propose_patch
tools.description: Render a patch as a unified-diff file under patches/<slug>.diff plus a preview file list at patches/<slug>.files.txt.

title.description: Short human-readable title; derives the filename.

hunks.description: List of patch hunks, each with file and new_content.
